subject: [RFC v2 05/21] mm: thp: handle split failure in zap_pmd_range()

reviews.author: Usama Arif
reviews.summary: No substantive review comments have been posted yet, but the patch has not been applied or merged by a maintainer. The thread is still in an active discussion phase.

2026-02-26.patch_summary: This patch proposes a change to the `zap_pmd_range()` function in the Linux kernel's memory management code. The function is responsible for handling partial unmaps of huge pages, and the patch aims to improve its behavior when splitting huge PMDs fails.
